framework.name: Stripe x402 Machine Payments
framework.description: Stripe has launched a private preview for machine-to-machine payments using the x402 HTTP payment protocol, built on USDC stablecoin on Base (Coinbase L2). Agents pay per-invocation using crypto wallets — no account setup or API keys needed. This is architecturally opposite to Mastercard's identity-chain approach: Stripe skips authentication entirely by using bearer-instrument payments (crypto), making the 'who authorized this' question irrelevant.
framework.raw_quote: As an alternative to setting up an account and getting an API key, your agent can interact with services on demand and pay per invocation. Your agents only needs access to a crypto wallet.
